chet holmgren.detail: Played 41 minutes, scored 8 points. No injury exit or DNP indicated.
chet holmgren.web_narrative: Holmgren played 41 minutes but shot poorly, finishing with just 8 points and falling short of the 10-point threshold. No injury or restriction noted; the miss appears to be cold shooting in a competitive double-overtime game.

de'aaron fox.detail: Fox did not play in Game 1; Dylan Harper started in his place, indicating Fox was out.
de'aaron fox.web_narrative: Fox was listed as questionable pre-game and did not play in Game 1 of the Western Conference Finals, with Dylan Harper taking his starting spot against the Thunder.

devin vassell.detail: Played 51 minutes in a double-overtime game. No injury or restriction flagged.

isaiah hartenstein.detail: Played only 12 minutes in a double-overtime game, consistent with a calf/soleus injury limiting his availability.
isaiah hartenstein.web_narrative: Hartenstein was limited to just 12 minutes in a double-overtime loss, likely due to a lingering right soleus strain. His restricted role left him with only 2 rebounds, well short of the 6-rebound prop.

jalen williams.detail: Returned from hamstring injury and played 37 minutes, scoring 26 points in double-overtime loss.

shai gilgeous-alexander.detail: Played 51 minutes in a double-overtime game. No injury or restriction flagged.

stephon castle.detail: Played 49 minutes in a double-overtime win, posting a double-double. No flags.

victor wembanyama.detail: Played 49 minutes in a double-overtime win, recording a historic 41-point, 24-rebound performance.
